The '''Model C-22 flame carbine''' was an incendiary weapon produced by [[Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc./Legends|Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc.]]. The carbine featured an external fuel canister worn on a belt and connected to the weapon by a flexible tube.

==History==
The C-22 was used by [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]] forces as a riot control device. It was issued as a secondary weapon to a standard [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] or [[Riot gun/Legends|riot control gun]].<ref name="EGWT" />

{{Weapon-stub}}
